message:
refactor: Convert more stdlib mods to comptime genConst pattern

Continue converting runtime helper functions to comptime generators:
- selectors_mod, pprint_mod, logging_mod, ssl_mod, zlib_mod
- threading_mod, traceback_mod, inspect_mod, dataclasses_mod
- resource_mod, chunk_mod, dis_mod, reprlib_mod, fileinput_mod

Reduces total lines from 10,172 to 10,040 (132 lines saved)
